title: Mineable Spawners
description: Mod that allows you to create spawners, but in a more interesting way!
body:
Mod that allows you to create spawners, but in a more interesting way! First, you will need to enchant your pickaxe with Silk Touch and break the spawner with it. It will drop Spawner Shards with a 70% chance, which will be used to create Spawn Ingot. You will need to use Spawn Ingots and souls to create your own Spawner. The Reinforced Spawner uses Sculk Soul, the End Spawner uses End Soul and the Nether Spawner uses Nether Soul.

Sculk Soul can be obtained by killing a Warden, End Soul can be obtained by killing an End Dragon, and Nether Soul can be obtained by killing Blaze (0.2%)
![current spawners](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e266025b39bbb3731c709089a4eac544d2219d9a.png)
